demo.title: distribute-tokens.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run — resolves handles, prints the plan, makes zero transfers
aeon-distribute-tokens list=contributors mode=dry-run

# Live execution with idempotency
aeon-distribute-tokens list=contributors mode=execute

# Recover from a partial run (skips already-completed rows for the day)
aeon-distribute-tokens list=contributors mode=execute

setup: Set `BANKR_API_KEY` with read-write scope; the skill preflights the scope before any transfer
Configure recipients + amounts in the list YAML
